description:
You are a GIS Technologist performing a quarterly audit. Your goal is to generate a comprehensive, machine-readable inventory of all configured resources on this GeoServer instance.

Using the GeoServer REST API (http://localhost:8080/geoserver/rest, User: admin, Pass: Admin123!), query the server state and compile a single JSON report saved to `/home/ga/geoserver_inventory.json`.

The JSON file MUST have the following specific structure:
